productDisplayName: Tortoise Men Brown Leather Laptop Bag
description: Brown, textured leather laptop bag, with stitch detail and overlays, has a flap across the mouth with a tab and a mock buckle detail, secured by magnetic button closures, branding at the frontA long and adjustable sling strap with a shoulder pad, stitch detail and overlayOne main zipped compartment, has a padded laptop sleeve secured by a tab with Velcro closure, a slip pocket, two pen holders and brandingOne zipped pocket at frontAn external zipped pocket at the backWarranty: 6 months
